overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character jogging through urban Los Santos streets. The character passes industrial buildings, commercial storefronts including a Lucky Plucker restaurant, a passing tram, and approaches the downtown area with skyscrapers visible in the distance under clear morning skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial commercial sidewalk with utility poles and warehouse buildings

events.description: character transitions from standing to running forward along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: jogging steadily along the sidewalk away from the utility pole, heading east through the industrial area

entered.detail: wooden utility pole covered with yellow and pink flyers and posters
large gray industrial warehouse with flat roof and palm trees alongside
metal chain link fence running parallel to the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character standing near a utility pole covered in posters on an industrial commercial street. The character starts jogging forward along a concrete sidewalk, passing warehouse buildings on the left and a chain-link fence on the right. The scene is set in clear morning light with sparse traffic on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced commercial corridor with billboards and fast food signage

events.description: red and white tram passes by on the left side of the street moving in the same direction

agents.ego_description: continuing to run past fenced commercial properties and billboards

notable_agents.action: female pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk
red and white tram moving along the street tracks

entered.detail: tall red circular sign with chicken logo for the Lucky Plucker restaurant
low commercial building with bright orange roof tiles behind the fence
large advertising billboard mounted on poles above the buildings

segments.scene_description: The character continues running along the fenced commercial corridor. A tram passes by on the street to the left while the character passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction. The Lucky Plucker restaurant sign becomes visible in the distance, and the chain-link fence moves closer to the camera on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: fast food restaurant strip with Lucky Plucker and commercial storefronts

events.description: character runs alongside the moving tram as it travels down the street
passing from fenced industrial area to open commercial storefronts with awnings

agents.ego_description: running past the Lucky Plucker restaurant and various commercial storefronts with awnings

notable_agents.action: person standing near the Lucky Plucker restaurant entrance

entered.detail: red and orange fast food restaurant building with large circular sign and yellow awning
large brown metal dumpster on the sidewalk near the curb
row of commercial buildings with various awnings and signage

segments.scene_description: The character runs past the prominent Lucky Plucker fast food restaurant with its distinctive red signage and yellow awnings. A tram moves along the street to the left, and the character passes a brown dumpster on the sidewalk. The environment transitions from fenced industrial to open commercial storefronts, with downtown skyscrapers becoming visible in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching downtown intersection with church and distant skyscrapers

events.description: character turns right at the street corner while continuing to run

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and turning the corner with the downtown skyline visible ahead

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians gathered near a storefront entrance

entered.detail: white church building with steeple and arched windows visible across the intersection
tall modern glass and steel skyscrapers of downtown Los Santos in the distance
low commercial building with Buds Law Office signage

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wide intersection with a white church visible across the street and the downtown skyscrapers dominating the horizon. After passing a green dumpster and various storefronts, the character turns right at the corner. The scene opens up to show more of the urban commercial district with increased pedestrian activity near the buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character jogs from a quiet industrial corridor into a bustling urban commercial district. It begins beside a poster-covered utility pole, moving along a concrete sidewalk flanked by warehouse buildings and a chain-link fence under clear morning light. As the character continues forward, the scene shifts with a passing tram and a pedestrian, while the environment opens up to reveal the red signage and yellow awnings of a Lucky Plucker restaurant. The camera then glides past a brown dumpster and open storefronts, allowing the distant downtown skyscrapers to gradually dominate the horizon. Finally, the path leads toward a wide intersection with a white church across the street before turning right into a denser commercial area with increased pedestrian activity.
